Wix to lay off 1,000 employees in biggest job cut in company history as AI pressure mounts
articles.description: Wix is preparing for its largest-ever layoffs, cutting approximately 1,000 employees, or 20% of its workforce. This significant downsizing follows a challenging first quarter, marked by a stock decline and increasing redundancy of roles due to AI advancements. Despite double-digit revenue growth, the company reported a net loss and a drop in cash flow, with operating expenses significantly increasing.

PNG holders can't retain domestic LPG connection -- Check latest govt order
articles.description: Any person having both a PNG connection and domestic LPG connection cannot retain a domestic LPG connection and will be required to immediately surrender their domestic LPG connection.

articles.title: Explainer: Why aeroplanes 'drink' kerosene-type fuel, not petrol
articles.description: Today, modern airlines mostly prefer Aviation Turbine Fuel, which is a special kerosene-type fuel made just for jet aircraft. Why? Because kerosene-based fuel is cheaper, safer to handle, and performs much better at very high altitudes and freezing temperatures. It is also not in heavy demand for many other purposes, unlike petrol.

articles.title: Tech Tonic | Ferrari Luce, Sir Jony Ive, and a subversion of ethos
articles.description: Ferrari Luce is trying to tell the carmakers of the world that cars don’t have to feel like driving a tablet.

articles.title: Govt won’t roll back new grain procurement norms for paddy: Haryana minister
articles.description: Rana, while speaking to the media, defended the mandi rules and said that the biometric system started this season ensured transparency in issuing gate passes of farmers only bringing crops to the purchase centre.

articles.title: India-Canada eye $50 bn trade as CEPA talks go
articles.description: India and Canada are working to finalize a trade agreement this year. Both nations aim to significantly boost economic cooperation. Bilateral trade is targeted to reach fifty billion dollars by twenty thirty. This renewed engagement follows recent high-level visits. Discussions also cover energy, agriculture, and technology partnerships. A large Indian business delegation is participating in the ongoing talks.

articles.title: Centre To Begin Fresh Hunt For Hidden Oil & Gas Reserves Across India | Exclusive
articles.description: CNN-NEWS18 had reported last week that the Modi government is also planning a major offshore oil-and-gas exploration survey covering thousands of kilometers on India's east coast

articles.title: Govt open to stakeholder views on reducing capital gains tax on stock investments: Finance minister
articles.description: Foreign portfolio investors have been fleeing Indian markets, driven by higher capital gains taxes, a weaker rupee, and shifting global allocations.

articles.title: Dividend alert! Last date to buy shares of these 12 companies for dividends worth over Rs 250. Do you own any?
articles.description: Twelve companies are set to turn ex-dividend on Friday, with payouts totaling over Rs 250. Investors must own shares by Thursday to be eligible due to SEBI's T+1 settlement and a market holiday. Bajaj Auto leads with a Rs 150 final dividend.

articles.title: ‘We are working fast’: PM Mark Carney on India-Canada free trade agreement
articles.description: India-Canada FTA: Joint Secretary in the Department of Commerce Brij Mohan Mishra is the chief negotiator for India, while Bruce Christie is Canada's chief negotiator.

articles.title: India, Canada signal renewed momentum in trade talks for CEPA deal
articles.description: India's Commerce Minister Piyush Goyal and Canadian PM Mark Carney signalled renewed momentum in bilateral trade talks, expressing optimism towards an early conclusion of the Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement (CEPA) to boost growth.

articles.title: NARCL retains guarantees of Jaypee ex-promoters to boost recovery of dues
articles.description: NARCL has already filed applications linked to both the corporate guarantee of Jaiprakash Power Ventures and personal guarantees of chairman Manoj Gaur and vice-chairman Sunil Kumar Sharma, and is exploring legal remedies to maximise recoveries from residual assets and obligations tied to Jaypee Group entities, they said.

articles.title: RBI panel to evaluate impact of quantum tech in finance
articles.description: The Reserve Bank of India has formed an eight-member committee to explore quantum technology's role in finance. Headed by an IIT Madras professor, the panel will assess opportunities, risks, and challenges. It will also review the financial sector's readiness for quantum-related threats. The committee aims to recommend a roadmap for safe adoption of quantum applications in finance within six months.

articles.title: Farmers will be given quality seeds & fertilisers for Kharif season: Yogi
articles.description: UP CM Yogi Adityanath orders timely Kharif 2026 prep, quality seeds/fertilisers, drought contingency plans, crop diversification, and anti-hoarding steps.

articles.title: Is this the best time to buy a home? Expert shares reasons property might be more affordable in 2026
articles.description: Homebuyers in 2026 face a complex affordability landscape. While loan rates are historically low, rising construction costs and a shrinking supply of affordable homes present challenges. Buyers must honestly assess their finances and consider long-term implications for a sustainable purchase.

articles.description: Fuel demand, particularly of diesel, is seeing a jump in certain pockets as a large number of bulk fuel consumers have shifted to public sector OMCs retail outlets due to a wide price gap between retail prices.

articles.description: Missing a few RD instalments does not cancel the account immediately, but it can reduce returns and change its status.

articles.title: Oyo parent PRISM's G6 Hospitality launches 38 new hotels across the US
articles.description: PRISM, the company behind Oyo, has launched 38 Studio 6 extended stay hotels across the United States. This expansion follows PRISM's acquisition of G6 Hospitality. The new hotels offer amenities for longer stays, targeting corporate professionals and relocating families. PRISM plans to integrate India-built technology into these properties, aiming for operational efficiency and an elevated guest experience.

articles.title: India cannot afford fear mongering, economy remains resilient amid global uncertainty: FM Sitharaman
articles.description: Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman said on Monday that India's economy continues to show resilience amid global uncertainty, and came out strongly against attempts to paint a 'pessimistic and cynical narrative' that presents an inaccurate picture of the country's growth trajectory.

articles.title: FIIs, retail investors raise stakes in 10 midcaps, but stocks slip up to 30%
articles.description: Foreign Institutional Investors (FIIs) and retail investors increased their stakes in nearly 20 midcap stocks over the March quarter. Despite this accumulation, 10 of the top laggards declined by 10% to 30% in the last six months, reflecting weak market sentiment.
